feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Why haven't you learned Spanish and moved to Spain yet, Anon? It's the best coun…
entry.content: Why haven't you learned Spanish and moved to Spain yet, Anon? It's the best country in Europe to live in right now.
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Remember when people were saying console players were too dumb for Death Strandi…
entry.content: Remember when people were saying console players were too dumb for Death Stranding 2, that's why nobody talked about it? That the PC release was going to bring back the real fans and that it would sell a heckin epic billion copies, a trillion threads? The PC release came and went just as quickly. What happens now?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've played and beat JRPG's in the past, but honestly, they feel like games you …
entry.content: I've played and beat JRPG's in the past, but honestly, they feel like games you can only enjoy when you're a kid who can sit there for an entire summer playing one game 8+ hours a day. They're not BAD games, they're just very hard to sit down and play to the end with how many options we have these days.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 144gb vram, 256gb of ram... and no kimi k3
entry.content: I have 6 3090s and I have no hope of running kimi. The qwen models seem to have no clue how to use mcp tools which is the best part of local models or models on your computer. I've had fable for a few days. And in that time I have because spoiled. Gluttonous. The higher usage levels, the ability to just let it go is actually dangerous. Not because it made mistakes, but because it didn't. I didn't need to review changes as much which hurt my knowledge of my own code base. But if kimi is even clos
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: just cancelled my home internet
entry.content: I got a company phone with aroung 25GB of data a month. I want to spend less time online and go outside more, plus it costs 40 bucks a month (including landline phone and cable TV, neither of which I use) I'll just create a hotspot with my phone if I need to use my laptop or iPad
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Imma be honest, I just played ac shadows for 21 hours. it's not that bad, typica…
entry.content: Imma be honest, I just played ac shadows for 21 hours. it's not that bad, typical ac experience (so boring and same shit over and over again) but the game itself ain't that bad, too bad the game is 80% AC and 20% kill bill/western whatever, and those 20% are divided and sprinkled randomly across the game/story, it makes no absolute sense, breaks the game flow. If only the retards at ubisoft could decide what the fuck they want to make, and yes, i skipped/rush anything related to giga nigga 9000,
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: How come modern box art is so generic now?
entry.content: >main character or two >lame pose >some level with max photorealism in the background That's it. What happened to all the symbolism, game icons, ink wash, etc. There's zero cool factor. Designed by lames to be at least offensive as possible.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Please forgive me for this question as it probably has a simple answer, but I ne…
entry.content: Please forgive me for this question as it probably has a simple answer, but I need to know. I found one of these the other day and I can't figure out why it exists in the first place. Why would you want such a small USB A to USB A adapter? I can understand if it is really long so you can extend your USB so you can plug things in from far away, but this one is less than 2 inches long. I know 2 inches is huge, but what the hell is this?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Robogf Thread
entry.content: What does the most advanced robogf setup look like in 2026? For a couple of years now I've been playing around with different bot setups, like hooking the bots up to 3d models, letting the AI see screens and react to things going on in them, trying to give it a good memory system, things like that. But none of it feels like it's good enough or comprehensive, it always feels like something is missing. How do you build something good enough that doesn't ruin your immersion? How can you make it not
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The thing that aged the most poorly about PS2 to late Source game era is easily …
entry.content: The thing that aged the most poorly about PS2 to late Source game era is easily all the yapping your character and enemies do. It would be one thing if these games were like TF2 tier, but most of these lines are genuinely so shit a B movie director would cut them, plus they are spammed every 2 fucking seconds which is super annoying and immersion breaking.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Creation club
entry.content: So, CC... how does it work? How much money can you actually make off of it as a modder? Surely it can't be ones main job. And since they're all mods i can't imagine them being high quality since modders can't change voice lines or animations or cutscenes etc. Are creation club mods canon since they're getting the green thumb from todd?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Everyone who’s seen it loved it. Guys like Nerdrotic and Critical Drinker decide…
entry.content: Everyone who’s seen it loved it. Guys like Nerdrotic and Critical Drinker decided they hate it months ago and need to cater (grift) to the audience of angry bitter trolls who decided they hate this movie without seeing it. The box office numbers, audience scores and cinema score speaks for itself. Your attempt at a culture war failed. Your attempt at cancelling the movie failed. Turns out when you just make a really good movie that will speak for itself. Cope
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: We used to have shortform media in the form of live theater, but that was replac…
entry.content: We used to have shortform media in the form of live theater, but that was replaced by films. We used to have longform media in the form of books, but that was replaced by television series. Granted, all 4 coexist. But significantly more people watch movies than go to live theater, and significantly more people watch TV than read books. My question is, will there be new mediums that ever replace film and TV just as film and TV replaced the supremacy of theater and books?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: I always laugh what if an anime nerd came to Reading, Pennsylvania
entry.content: They would realize it's Japan as it used to be. We have an authentic pagoda. This isn't some money making scheme the history is nuts. It's the place to come and chill and listen to music or kiss a beautiful girl. I feel sorry for EVERY other city in the world. You may be bigger than us, stronger than us, more famous than us, but you'll never have more Reading Pagoda's than us.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: How do indians relate to their gods if the way they always incarnated was as kin…
entry.content: How do indians relate to their gods if the way they always incarnated was as kings and princes and other pampered people? What empathy do their gods have? Why fear them if they are neither omnipotent nor loving of the miserable indian? If abrahamic religions are foreign, why not Buddhism, why not try to escape them and the horrendous nation they seem to have trapped hindus in?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.content: Good day, gentlemen. I'm looking for advice from the finest minds of the intenet. Some time ago, I saw Fuckface Neighbor starting to hit my elderly dog and I confronted him about it. The altercation turned physical quickly, and police were called. I'd like ideas on how to get back at him. So far, I've thought about sending him a couple of dildos and a dick enlarging pump, but I'm open to more creative suggestions. Of course, I would send him a wired pipe bomb if I could, but it has to be somethi

entry.title: /news/ News: MAGA propagandists Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami for rape and sex trafficking
entry.content: https://apnews.com/article/tate-bro thers-social-influencers-arrest-82b 6638219839dcf653c09309da66f16 Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate, whose social media empire promoting wealth, male dominance and misogyny has made them among the world’s most polarizing internet personalities, were arrested Saturday in Miami as British authorities sought their extradition on rape and sex trafficking charges. The brothers were taken into custody by the U.S. Marshals Service on a sealed warrant, agenc

entry.content: /vtsg/ - Vtuber Slut Posting General Minty Fresh edition >What is /vtsg/? A general for those who enjoy the lewd side of the vtuber world. Fantasize, discuss, ERP with, or post NSFW of your favorite corpo or indie vtubers! Don't just lurk, feel free to contribute in any way: by worshiping your oshi in the thread, joining other anons having fun, or even indulging other anons's fantasies about any chuuba! >Last Thread https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84100597/ >Thread Question(s) Do you prefe
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: reminder ehehe
entry.content: One of the biggest mistakes people subconsciously make nowadays is not understanding how "work hard, play hard" works. They assume it is a binary-type switch, and focusing on work is the better of the two. This is simply not the case! What you were not told outright is that you must split your time "dynamically", similar to a CPU governor. As a piss-poor analogy, Google fucked up with the Tensor G1 in the Pixel 6. The CPU cluster was as follows: >two Cortex-X1s >two Cortex-A76s >four Cortex-A55s
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >The Odyssey Backlash Failed Tremendously
entry.content: >For all the hysteria over “woke” casting and ahistorical choices, Christopher Nolan’s epic is on track to make $200 million globally during its opening weekend.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I'm going to be completely honest: this movie is puffed up garbage. There isn't …
entry.content: I'm going to be completely honest: this movie is puffed up garbage. There isn't a polite way to say this. Nolan does not reproduce Homer, and it certainly does not have to be faithful, but he also doesn't confront him, rebel against him, or even reinterpret him in a thought-provoking way. Rather, Nolan uses Homer like expensive seasoning, something to give the illusion of taste in an otherwise generic blockbuster that lacks any exploration of the poem's themes of ancient honor, hospitality, cunn
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.content: The Turkish kebab owner has fully replaced the Jewish tavern owner as a basic building block of Polish society

entry.title: /g/ Technology: These "people" live among us
entry.content: These "people" live among us
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology
